hooks.command: failed=0; ruff_dirs=''; for d in protocol storage api tests tools; do [ -d "$d" ] && ruff_dirs="$ruff_dirs $d"; done; mypy_dirs=''; for d in protocol storage api; do [ -d "$d" ] && mypy_dirs="$mypy_dirs $d"; done; if [ -n "$ruff_dirs" ]; then echo '=== ruff check --fix ==='; ruff check --fix $ruff_dirs || failed=1; echo '=== ruff format ==='; ruff format $ruff_dirs || failed=1; if git diff --name-only -- $ruff_dirs | grep -q .; then echo 'ruff modified tracked files — re-stage and retry'; failed=1; fi; else echo 'No Python source dirs present — skipping ruff (Python retired in v0.9).'; fi; if [ -n "$mypy_dirs" ]; then echo '=== mypy ==='; mypy $mypy_dirs || failed=1; fi; if [ $failed -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-commit checks failed (ruff/mypy). Fix errors above before committing."}'; exit 1; fi
